title: Oscars 2026: The best jokes from Conan O’Brien’s monologue
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Conan O'Brien hosted the 2026 Oscars with high-energy humor, targeting Netflix, Timothee Chalamet, and himself.
O'Brien used pre-taped sketches and topical jokes, predicting future Oscars on YouTube featuring Jane Lynch ads.
Jimmy Kimmel made politically charged jokes, criticizing CBS and North Korea during the Best Documentary categories.

title: Fundraiser: Community remembers Danvers mother, nurse killed in her home
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Janet Swallow, 68, a Danvers nurse, was allegedly killed by high school senior Anthony DeMayo in her home.
A GoFundMe campaign has raised nearly $50,000 for Swallow's family, with a goal of $65,000.
DeMayo, 18, allegedly confessed to stabbing Swallow and was found with a bloody knife in Lynn.

title: Northeastern women’s hockey advances to Frozen Four after defeating Minnesota
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Northeastern women's hockey team advances to the Frozen Four after a 4-2 win against Minnesota.
Sophomore goalie Lisa Jönsson made 45 saves to help secure the victory at Ridder Arena.
The Huskies will face No. 1 Ohio State at Penn State's Pegula Ice Arena on March 20.

title: Bomb threat reportedly halts plane at Logan ‘for hours’ before being deemed ‘not credible’
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: A bomb threat delayed a JetBlue flight at Boston Logan Airport Saturday, but was later deemed not credible by State Police.
FBI agents, firefighters, and bomb-sniffing dogs investigated the plane, and luggage was inspected before passengers could leave.
No arrests have been made, and an investigation is ongoing after an unidentified caller claimed there was a bomb on board.

title: 17 arrested during St. Patrick’s Day parade in South Boston, police say
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Seventeen arrests made during the St. Patrick's Day parade in South Boston due to a crackdown on public drinking.
The parade attracted nearly a million attendees and began at Andrew Square, altering its usual route for crowd management.
Residents filed complaints about underage drinking and public indecency during the event, prompting police responses.

title: 2026 Oscars: Full list of winners (updating live)
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'One Battle After Another' wins Best Picture, collecting six Oscars including Best Director and Best Casting at the 2026 Oscars.
Michael B. Jordan receives Best Actor for 'Sinners,' contributing to the film's total of four awards at the ceremony.
'KPop Demon Hunters' wins Best Animated Feature, while 'Frankenstein' secures awards for Visual Effects and Costume Design.

title: Oscars red carpet: See the best Academy Awards fashion
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: The 2026 Oscars red carpet featured stars like Kate Hudson, Timothee Chalamet, and Elle Fanning at the Dolby Theatre.
Conan O'Brien, hosting the Oscars for the second year, appeared on the red carpet with Liza Powel O'Brien.
Celebrities including Leonardo DiCaprio, Emma Stone, and Nicole Kidman showcased their fashion on the Oscars red carpet.

title: All the way from Indonesia, she’s running the Boston Marathon for people with visual impairments
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Fransisca Miraningtyas, 46, from Jakarta, Indonesia, is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for visual impairment awareness.
Miraningtyas, living with pterygium, uses her participation to highlight the need for accessible eye care.
She hopes her run raises awareness and support for those needing vision-restoring treatments.

title: 5 takeaways from the Revolution’s 6-1 dismantling of FC Cincinnati
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Revolution tied a club record with six goals in their 6-1 victory over FC Cincinnati.
Luca Langoni contributed three first-half assists, playing a key role in New England's attack on Sunday.
Diego Fagundez returned to New England, providing a secondary assist in his first game back since 2020.

title: Man dies after kayak overturns off Cape Cod
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: A 22-year-old man died after his kayak overturned in Wellfleet, Cape Cod Saturday evening, officials reported.
Emergency crews, including local fire departments and a Coast Guard helicopter, conducted a search for the kayaker.
The man was found in critical condition nearly two hours later and pronounced dead at Cape Cod Hospital.
